question: Can late standardization (after free transmission) recover AT-like H?

NT.description: Free copying 50–350 CE, Byzantine standardization ~350 CE

Mishnah.description: Free oral debate ~200 BCE–200 CE, Judah haNasi codification ~200 CE

interpretation: 2/2 late-standardized corpora show AT-like H. Some recovery may be possible, but the sample is too small to confirm.
